hypothesis: Systems-optimizer ratchets become more promotable and deterministic if control-plane-only slices must use a scope-local promotion bundle and cannot treat stale-truth-sensitive global health commands as keep-discard gates.
measurement: Before the ratchet, seeded systems-optimizer cards still used `node CLAW/scripts/run-site-script.mjs claw:validate` and `node CLAW/scripts/run-site-script.mjs claw:health` as promotion gates, so stale route or runtime truth outside the writable slice could block an otherwise bounded control-plane ratchet. After the ratchet, the verifier rejects seeded cards that omit the scope-local promotion bundle or include those global health commands, and the fixed bundle stays green.
keep_rule: Keep only if `CLAW/scripts/verify-systems-optimizer.mjs` rejects future seeded cards that lack the scope-local promotion bundle or reintroduce `claw:validate` or `claw:health`, and the fixed evaluation bundle passes without touching route implementation paths.
learning_item: Systems-optimizer promotion bundles must stay scope-local; global health commands belong to runner observability, not keep-discard criteria for control-plane-only ratchets.
